calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Donald Sherrill, Esq. special appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Alice M. Davis.
Declaration of Dorothy Ruiz under CCP 98, was presented in open court.
After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Damages - $5999.53
Costs - $284.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $6,283.53
Plaintiff waived prejudgment interest.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
